entities.name: the Shaman's Echo-Song
entities.description: The Shaman's Echo-Song continues, but softer now, a sustained, gentle hum designed to keep the pattern from remembering its original, deadly shape.

entities.name: the fragment's rhythm
entities.description: The fragment's rhythm is used to monitor environmental and societal changes.

entities.name: the mending needle
entities.description: More water, carefully increased. Small but more frequent nourishment. Controlled warmth--enough to support his healing body, not to feed the remnants of the pattern.

entities.name: the man
entities.description: The man is no longer a carrier; the pattern is gone.

entities.name: the clearing
entities.description: You rise slowly, looking out at the thawing landscape. 'This is no longer a battle,' you say quietly. 'It is a clearing. And we do not trample what is already falling.'

entities.name: the fragment's rhythm

entities.name: the man
entities.description: A patient suffering from a systemic, invasive affliction that has transformed his body into a structured, almost mechanical pattern of fever, red geometric lesions, and a rhythmic, programmed vitality.

entities.name: the pattern
entities.description: An alien pattern within the man that is being disrupted and collapsed.

entities.name: the green luminescence
entities.description: The green luminescence flickers erratically, losing its synchronized pulse.

entities.name: the clearing
entities.description: A location where the player and the tribe are now in a state of clearing what remains of the pattern.
